news.title:
Liquor stocks like United Spirits, Radico Khaitan surged 4-7% due to Karnataka's excise reforms, deregulating alcohol pricing.
Reforms include AIB-based taxation, reducing price categories, boosting premium brands, and targeting long-term revenue growth.
news.summary:
Liquor stocks like United Spirits, Radico Khaitan surged 4-7% due to Karnataka's excise reforms, deregulating alcohol pricing.
Reforms include AIB-based taxation, reducing price categories, boosting premium brands, and targeting long-term revenue growth.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan's Old Admiral Brandy sales doubled to 10M cases in FY26 vs 5.6M FY25.
Growth driven by Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Karnataka; marketing boosted brand presence.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan's Old Admiral Brandy sales doubled to 10M cases in FY26 vs 5.6M FY25.
Growth driven by Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Karnataka; marketing boosted brand presence.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan released an updated investor presentation covering industry trends, company overview, strategy, and financials.
It highlights India's growing spirits market and premiumization; accessible on the company website.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan released an updated investor presentation covering industry trends, company overview, strategy, and financials.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan's stock rose 404% over 5 years, with a 17% annual EPS growth and a P/E ratio of 73.3.
Total shareholder return (TSR) was 409%, surpassing share price return due to dividends and other benefits.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan's stock rose 404% over 5 years, with a 17% annual EPS growth and a P/E ratio of 73.3.
Total shareholder return (TSR) was 409%, surpassing share price return due to dividends and other benefits.

Radico Khaitan to attend Dolat Capital's Annual Flagship Conference on Feb 18, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be discussed; presentation available on company's website.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan executed a block trade of ~359,590 shares at Rs. 2757.3.
The trade totaled Rs. 99.15 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:

news.title:
Radico Khaitan reported its highest-ever quarterly performance in Q3 FY26 with 9.75M cases, Rs.1547Cr revenue, and Rs.265Cr EBITDA, driven by premiumization and operational efficiency.
Key launches like Rampur 1943 Virasat Indian Single Malt and strong growth in premium brands like Royal Ranthambore (+50%) and Magic Moments Vodka (+18%) highlight its strategic focus.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan reported its highest-ever quarterly performance in Q3 FY26 with 9.75M cases, Rs.1547Cr revenue, and Rs.265Cr EBITDA, driven by premiumization and operational efficiency.
Key launches like Rampur 1943 Virasat Indian Single Malt and strong growth in premium brands like Royal Ranthambore (+50%) and Magic Moments Vodka (+18%) highlight its strategic focus.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan Ltd surged 5.4% on 30 Jan 2026, reaching Rs 2,835.
The stock rebounded after 4 declining sessions, outperforming its sector by 2.8%.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan Ltd surged 5.4% on 30 Jan 2026, reaching Rs 2,835.

news.summary: Elara Capital retains Accumulate rating on Radico Khaitan, revising target price to 3,500.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan targets 20-25% volume growth in FY26, driven by premiumisation, with its Prestige Above category expected to grow 15% over 2-3 years.
Radico achieved Q3FY26 revenue of ₹1,547 crore, net profit of ₹155 crore, and 17.3% margins; stock gained 32% YTD, trading at ₹2,958.70.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan targets 20-25% volume growth in FY26, driven by premiumisation, with its Prestige Above category expected to grow 15% over 2-3 years.
Radico achieved Q3FY26 revenue of ₹1,547 crore, net profit of ₹155 crore, and 17.3% margins; stock gained 32% YTD, trading at ₹2,958.70.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan forecasts fiscal 2027 revenue growth of 13-15%, exceeding analyst estimates.
The company banks on strong demand for premium spirits like Jaisalmer and Rampur brands.
news.summary:
Radico Khaitan forecasts fiscal 2027 revenue growth of 13-15%, exceeding analyst estimates.

news.title:
Radico Khaitan's board approved setting up Radico Khaitan Scotland Ltd.
The subsidiary will focus on distillation, storage, and trading of Scotch and spirits.
news.summary:

news.title:
India's liquor sector growth may moderate in Q3FY26 after 4 quarters of double-digit gains.
Brokerages foresee spirits, beer, and wine revenue growth slowing to mid-single digits.
